com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.provider

Interface LuckyRecipeProvider


  • public interface LuckyRecipeProvider
    Provides methods for creating and managing recipes for Lucky Blocks.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ILuckyRecipeItem createItem(DyeColor color)
      Creates a new recipe item based on the given dye color.
      ILuckyRecipeItem createItem(ItemStack itemStack)
      Creates a new recipe item based on the given ItemStack.
      ILuckyRecipeItem createItem(Material material)
      Creates a new recipe item based on the given material.
      ILuckyRecipeItem createItemAnyLuckyBlockType()
      Creates a new recipe item that can represent any type of Lucky Block.
      ILuckyRecipe createRecipe(LuckyBlockKey related, ILuckyRecipeItem[] items, java.lang.String permission, boolean anyMatrix)
      Creates a new recipe for a Lucky Block with the specified related type, items, permission, and matrix requirement.
      java.util.List<ILuckyRecipe> getCustomCrafts(LuckyBlockKey type)
      Retrieves the custom recipes for a given Lucky Block type.
      java.util.List<ILuckyRecipe> getDefaultCrafts(LuckyBlockKey key)
      Retrieves the default recipes for a given Lucky Block type.

    • Method Detail

      • createItem

        ILuckyRecipeItem createItem(Material material)
        Creates a new recipe item based on the given material.
        Parameters:
        material - the material to create the recipe item from
        Returns:
        a new instance of ILuckyRecipeItem representing the given material

      • createItem

        ILuckyRecipeItem createItem(DyeColor color)
        Creates a new recipe item based on the given dye color.
        Parameters:
        color - the dye color to create the recipe item from
        Returns:
        a new instance of ILuckyRecipeItem representing the given dye color

      • createItem

        ILuckyRecipeItem createItem(ItemStack itemStack)
        Creates a new recipe item based on the given ItemStack.
        Parameters:
        itemStack - the ItemStack to create the recipe item from
        Returns:
        a new instance of ILuckyRecipeItem representing the given ItemStack

      • createItemAnyLuckyBlockType

        ILuckyRecipeItem createItemAnyLuckyBlockType()
        Creates a new recipe item that can represent any type of Lucky Block.
        Returns:
        a new instance of ILuckyRecipeItem that can represent any type of Lucky Block

      • createRecipe

        ILuckyRecipe createRecipe(LuckyBlockKey related,
                          ILuckyRecipeItem[] items,
                          java.lang.String permission,
                          boolean anyMatrix)
        Creates a new recipe for a Lucky Block with the specified related type, items, permission, and matrix requirement.
        Parameters:
        related - the related Lucky Block type for this recipe
        items - the array of recipe items required for this recipe
        permission - the permission required to use this recipe (can be null or empty for no permission)
        anyMatrix - whether this recipe can be crafted in any crafting matrix (true) or only in a provided 3x3 crafting grid with correct order (false)
        Returns:
        a new instance of ILuckyRecipe representing the created recipe

      • getDefaultCrafts

        java.util.List<ILuckyRecipe> getDefaultCrafts(LuckyBlockKey key)
        Retrieves the default recipes for a given Lucky Block type.
        Parameters:
        key - the Lucky Block type for which to retrieve the default recipes
        Returns:
        a list of ILuckyRecipe instances representing the default recipes for the specified Lucky Block type

      • getCustomCrafts

        java.util.List<ILuckyRecipe> getCustomCrafts(LuckyBlockKey type)
        Retrieves the custom recipes for a given Lucky Block type.
        Parameters:
        type - the Lucky Block type for which to retrieve the custom recipes
        Returns:
        a list of ILuckyRecipe instances representing the custom recipes for the specified Lucky Block type
